options.content:
**This is a placeholder.** Claude Code does not emit a `fix_cycles` metric directly. Per parent issue #101, `fix_cycles` will be derived during Sub-issue B (clustering by `prompt.id` within a session) or computed by the baseline harness in Sub-issue D. Until then, this dashboard shows a rough proxy: count of `api_request` events per session as a stand-in for prompt turns.

**Refine when** Sub-issue D lands and publishes the baseline-harness session JSON schema (see `docs/telemetry-schema.md`).

panels.title: api_request events per minute (proxy for prompt turns)
